comment: P3 verifier calibration (caution.md C-004: a name-match failure is the only evidence of non-appearance; a lookup that never ran proves nothing). The candidate claims a register_absence (the firm does not appear on the SRA register) but the register lane was DEGRADED (a missing API key), so it never ran a real name-match. breach/verifiers/register-absence.js must refuse this: a degraded lane proves nothing about registration, exactly as C-004 requires. verifyCandidate must return verified:false with code register_absence_not_proven. Run via: node breach/verifiers/quote-match.js --calibrate.
